title: Wynnish Basics
description: A lightweight modpack to enhance the Wynncraft experience
body:
This is a Wynncraft modpack containing 9 mods which help to enhance playing the Wynncraft Minecraft server

This modpack is also a great starting point if you want to make your own wynncraft themed modpack, in the authors opinion, it contains mods which every wynncraft modpack should contain

Mods Included:

- Cloth Config
- Distant Horizons
- Dynamic FPS
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu
- No Chat Reports
- Text Placeholder API
- Visible Barriers
- Wynntils

It may also include the Figura mod when it releases for Minecraft 1.21.1

# Curseforge Version
Due to Modrinth's upload size limit, the Modrinth version of this modpack does not have the Voices Of Wynn mod and mapped out Distant Horizons data for the Wynncraft server, those features are available in the [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/wynnish-basics) version
